_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and evaluate threat critical capabilities, requirements, and vulnerabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.536), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.658). Shared vocabulary: [threat]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, critical, evaluate, identify, requirements, vulnerabilities] vs WIDAI-only terms [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.898 (P=0.913, R=0.884). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Identify and evaluate threat critical capabilities, requirements, and vulnerabil" and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.550 < STS 0.658 (gap -0.108). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [capabilities, critical, evaluate] and [actors, ai, applicable] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [threat]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, critical, evaluate, identify, requirements, vulnerabilities]. WIDAI-only: [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct].
